name: BUG-001 regression: wrong weapon in narration
description: Attack with dagger (not quarterstaff). After attack roll resolves, narrator should reference dagger, not quarterstaff or longbow. Submits attack roll (hit) + damage roll to get full narration.

steps.message: A goblin scout leaps from the shadows — I draw my dagger and attack!
I attack the goblin with my dagger!
